The large chunk count is expected — CodeMirror's `@codemirror/language-data` ships grammars for ~120
languages as separate chunks that only load when a fenced code block uses that language. Cloudflare
This will prompt you to authenticate with Cloudflare (if not already logged in via `wrangler login`)
and create the `markdown-notes` Pages project on first deploy. Want me to run the deploy now?
Run the deploy command and see what happens. If wrangler needs authentication, we can
skip actual deployment and instead create a detailed deployment guide for the user. However, if we
can deploy (maybe wrangler is already logged in), go ahead. Let me know the result.
